parents.subject: LU-17814 utils: fix compiler errors in pfind

commit.subject: LU-17431 nodemap: rbac roles in child_raise_privileges
commit.message:
LU-17431 nodemap: rbac roles in child_raise_privileges

Only rbac roles specified in the child_raise_privileges property of
the parent can be added to the child's nodemap rbac list, in addition
to the rbac roles supported by the parent.

Fixes: 904a7f1e83 ("LU-17431 nodemap: introduce child_raise_privileges property")
Signed-off-by: Sebastien Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>
Change-Id: Ia3412561e8202830291e88d9fdf0e24a05ba4a94
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/59918
Reviewed-by: Marc Vef <mvef@whamcloud.com>
